creator: sergei@FreeBSD.org
text:
In the beginning, there was sysutils/cfengine. Then, after Cfengine 2.0 came out,
the port was repo-copied under sysutils/cfengine2 name. Then, as Cfengine 2.x matured,
it became obvious that 1.x is not in such widespread use anymore, so we deleted
port for Cfengine 1.x (sysutils/cfengine) about a year ago (2005-10-20).

I think the time has come to rename sysutils/cfengine2 port to be just sysutils/cfengine.

Fix: 

Perform repo-copy.
